commands.review_summary:
The PR updates embedded-run payload warning policy so default-verbosity exec/bash failures emit concise user-visible warnings while raw stderr stays hidden, and adds payload regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a source-level reproduction through buildEmbeddedRunPayloads with assistant success text plus lastToolError for exec: the policy suppresses the warning before mutating-tool handling, and current tests assert that old suppression behavior.
